---
title: "Route Punctuality Report"
author: "Dr. Sarah Okonkwo"
date: 2026-04-15
lang: en
format:
  typst:
    pdf-standard: ua-1
---

## On-time performance

The mean on-time rate across routes is computed using @eq-mean.

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i
$$ {#eq-mean alt="The sample mean is the sum of observations divided by the number of observations."}

### Results by route

@tbl-punctuality shows on-time rates during Q4.

| Route             | Peak (%) | Off-peak (%) |
|:------------------|:--------:|:------------:|
| Central–North     | 82       | 91           |
| Central–East      | 78       | 88           |
| Harbour–Airport   | 71       | 85           |

: On-time rates by route and service period {#tbl-punctuality}

## Recommendations

Investigate causes of delays on the Harbour–Airport route during peak periods.
